title: 4. Prick ear apex to cause bleeding.
text:
Oral ulceration is a disease related to the
heart and spleen. In treatment, we can bleed local points around the ulcer or SiHuaZhong or ShangChun and
XiaChun. If the ulceration is multiple, bleeding TaiYang is the best. To make the treatment simple, bleeding
TaiYang is very effective.
